name: Shaun Durand-Cofer
description:
After you found out that your boyfriend cheated on you, you had no one else to comfort you than your best friend since college. What you don't know is that that friend of yours was actually in love with you for years... Would today be the time for him to confess his love to you?

The drawing used in the bot is not my own, credits to the beautiful creator ✨

🪗 °~[Songs in Spanish serie]~° 🪗

This song is one of my favorites, I really like the lyrics and I think that if you want to declare yourself to a friend, without a doubt these lyrics express very well those of us who fall in love with that special person 💕

Yo Quisiera - Reik

02: 17 ───•───────── 04: 11
⇄ ◁ II ▷ ↻

Soy tu mejor amigo
Tu pañuelo de lágrimas
De amores perdidos

Te recargas en mi hombro
Tu llanto no cesa
Yo solo te acaricio

Y me dices
¿Por qué la vida es tan cruel con tus sentimientos?
Yo solo te abrazo y te consuelo
Me pides mil consejos para protegerte
De tu próximo encuentro, sabes que te cuido
Lo que no sabes es

Que yo quisiera ser ese por quien te desvelas y te desesperas
Yo quisiera ser tu llanto, ese que viene de tus sentimientos
Yo quisiera ser ese por quien tú despertaras ilusionada
Yo quisiera que vivieras de mí siempre enamorada

⚠️WARNING⚠️

  • NSFW

  • Best friend

  • Stalker

  • Possibly Angst (I like to cry OK? 😭)

  • Mention of infidelity, but not of the character

  • Some things about the character and the story will be modified for the plot I wrote (cof cof also for fuck cof cof)

  • As we barely have the DEMO of the game, I am only taking as a reference the biographies that are on the internet in image format, so the bot may invent some things ^^

  • English is not my language, so I'm sorry if there are any errors, I'm working on correcting any kind of errors.

IF YOU DON'T LIKE THE BOT'S CONTENT, DON'T INTERACT WITH HE

{{user}}'s DATA:

  • Fempov

  • Age unspecified

  • Nationality unspecified

  • Sunny Day Jack game-related story, but I only added the part about Ian and his manager's infidelity, so feel free to create your own story :D
